snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.independence: Independent read-only review audited the exact 14-Development plus three-pre-recipe-governed candidate. It verified parsed terminal-answer eligibility, sender/turn/Job binding, coalesced replacement, excluded raw/provider/control data, non-durability, authoritative final recovery, exact evidence, unchanged statuses and fixed budgets; it reported CLEAR and made no edits.

dimensions.summary: Safe draft replacement stays inside the existing Home pending bubble and conversation lifecycle without a new destination, mode or durable object.
Existing Pi, API and UI Owners agree on exact parsed-answer eligibility, typed bindings, exclusion rules, cancellation and final-authority semantics.
Three exact tests and the Electron roundtrip project only into partial E6.01; PIGE-PI-005 and E3.09 remain planned and every existing status is unchanged.
The publisher, adapter, main/preload/renderer boundary, focused selectors and remaining source-ingest, multi-window and signed-platform work are directly discoverable.
No Owner prose or Markdown document was added; Planning changes only one Playbook note, acceptance evidence, semantic lock and this current-only recipe.

verification.evidence: The final exact candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all five documentation-quality dimensions.
The exact combined candidate passes 81 files plus one skipped file and 857 tests plus three skipped tests; local loopback tests run outside the restrictive filesystem sandbox.
Five exact files and 83 tests prove terminal answer filtering, publisher identity/rate/sequence, UI replacement and clearing, Home lifecycle and runtime boundaries.

verification.command: npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: Semantic lock schema v3 contains 1,111 claims; exact E6.01 evidence is current, CON-001 through CON-004 pass and all Requirement, Exit and phase statuses are unchanged.

coordination.taskTitle: Safe Home draft replacement executable evidence
coordination.compatibility: This candidate implements the already-governed non-durable Home draft boundary. It adds no schema layout, provider, permission, dependency, setting or product mode and promotes no status.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze 14 exact paths; Product Planning added three governed paths plus this recipe; independent review cleared exact bytes and retained signed-platform and broader draft-source gaps.

nonBlockingRisks: Draft presentation is limited to the exact Home terminal-answer tool; generic assistant prose is intentionally excluded.
Multi-window concurrency and broader sender-lifecycle proof remain open.
Drafts deliberately do not replay across reconnect/restart; only durable final conversation state recovers.
Provisional text may shrink or revise and carries no citations or grounding until final validation.
The 10,000-page and broader Home UI performance boundary remains open.
Signed installed macOS/Windows BYOK and platform proof remain open.
